name: yao-deepseek-crawler
input_files: required standard inputs: repeat count, target entity, and entity type
output_contract: summary.json analysis metrics with target entity recognition and same-type competitor comparison
structured-data.md Markdown export of cleaned structured fields and analysis tables
structured-data.xlsx Excel workbook with the same structured sheets as the Markdown export

report.html Kami-styled visual report with overview, directory, metric explanations, entity classification, probability tables, target-vs-competitor module, clickable citations with unique compact URL labels, GEO trend projections, and capped detail lists
rollback_boundary: The skill writes only to the selected run output directory and does not modify the source DeepSeek crawler project.
local_dependencies: Node.js 21+ for fresh crawling; Node.js 18+ for analysis-only usage
DeepSeek browser crawler script, defaulting to ../../SourceCode/opencli-boss-ai/scripts/geo-deepseek-browser-direct.mjs
